cell-message.description: Direct message between agents. Writes to recipient inbox, appends to sender outbox.

announcement.description: Broadcast-style message to agent or group. Appends to sender outbox.

task.started.description: Worker started an assigned task. Payload: {harness, worker, task_id}.

task.completed.description: Worker completed an assigned task. Payload: {harness, worker, task_id, summary}.

sidecar.proposal.description: Sidecar proposes a new worker for operator approval.

prompt.description: User prompt event. worker-prompt-notify fires when harness is a worker (canonical contains /).

file-edit.description: File was edited by an agent.

tool-call.description: Tool was invoked by an agent.

agent.stopped.description: Agent stopped gracefully (hook_pass fired, graceful-stop sentinel written).

agent.respawned.description: Watchdog respawned agent after graceful sleep window elapsed.

agent.crash.description: Pane or process died without graceful-stop sentinel — likely a crash.

agent.stuck.description: Agent process alive but no tool calls for >10 min.

agent.nudged.description: Watchdog sent a wake prompt to a stuck agent.

agent.crash-loop.description: >3 crashes per hour for same canonical — watchdog stopped retrying.

agent.state-changed.description: Observability event for agent state.json mutations.

agent.memory-updated.description: Observability event for agent MEMORY.md edits.

agent.policy-appended.description: Audit trail for policy.json context injections.

agent.issue-filed.description: Agent filed a GitHub issue via report-issue --github. Payload: {id, github_url, title, reporter}.

notification.description: Operator notification request. Payload: {message, title?, url?}. Side-effect calls terminal-notifier.
